title: Server terminates upon UPDATE
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE blobtest(b BLOB, id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY);
INSERT INTO blobtest (b, id) VALUES(CAST('00' AS BLOB), 1);
INSERT INTO blobtest (b, id) VALUES(CAST('01' AS BLOB), 2);
UPDATE blobtest SET b = CAST(CONCAT(CAST(b AS VARCHAR), ' appended') AS BLOB) WHERE id = 1;
UPDATE blobtest SET b = NULL WHERE id = 2;
key_bug_features: UPDATE operation on blob data type causes server termination
